title: A Whale Appears Ahead
description: On pages 5–8, a whale appears ahead as the Straw Hats collide with Laboon, a gigantic whale guarding the entrance to the Grand Line, and Luffy is separated inside it.
scene: A Whale Appears Ahead. The Straw Hats collide with Laboon, a gigantic whale guarding the entrance to the Grand Line, and Luffy is separated inside it. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's no good! The rudder won't budge!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Good! I wonder if the ship stopped now?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Now's our chance! Run for it!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What's with this thing!? Did it not even feel that cannonball just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Who the hell cares! Let's just get quite here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Row! Just row as fast as you can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've got to get away from this thing just now!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on a whale appears ahead. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
